name: Lettustone
description: A common green keystone attuned to stone. No longer found in the tomb.

name: Hamethyst
description: The common violet keystone of the hearth, found throughout the tomb.

name: Salamite
description: A common ember-red keystone attuned to the gothic depths. No longer found in the tomb.

name: Iceland Spar
description: A common clear keystone attuned to the shining halls. No longer found in the tomb.

name: Silver
description: A rare metal gem, cool and bright, found only among plain stone.

name: Copper
description: A rare metal gem, warm and ruddy, found only in the crystal caves.

name: Gold
description: The most prized of the forge's ingots, found only in the gothic depths.

name: Bloodhive
description: A very rare exotic gem that pulses with crimson life, found only in the gothic depths.

name: Blackglass
description: A very rare exotic gem of polished void-glass, found only in the shining halls.

name: Malachor
description: A very rare exotic gem veined with green fire, found only among plain stone.

name: Fluoron
description: A very rare exotic gem glowing electric cyan, found only in the crystal caves.
